title: Summary Depth and Explosive Load Calculations
notes: Shot Diagram and Drill Log Information now include a Hole Diameter selection from 3.0 to 5.5 inches, defaulting to 3.5 inches for existing data.
Both PDF summary sheets now report the drilled depth range across all valid positive hole depths.
The Shot Diagram summary calculates explosive weight from ANFO footage, 7-pound dinks, and bare-pound entries in Primary and Secondary Load.
The Shot Diagram summary identifies the lightest and heaviest eligible explosive loads and warns when a load entry cannot be interpreted.
Dirt and bad holes are excluded from explosive-load comparisons; wet holes remain included.
All m39.2 Shot Diagram and Drill Log selection, transfer, GPS, structured condition, Quick Fill, theme, and offline features remain included.
